copilot-mcp.description: Route tasks to VS Code Copilot models (requires VS Code extension — run tools/install-copilot-mcp.sh)

_comments.usage: Copy the servers you need to your ~/.claude.json mcpServers section
_comments.env_vars: Replace YOUR_*_HERE placeholders with actual values
_comments.placeholders: {FOUNDRY_ROOT} is substituted by setup.py at deploy time with the absolute path to the claude-foundry repo
_comments.adding_mcps: Search npmjs.com for mcp-server or visit github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers
